Compass

June 10–24, 2026 | Issue #1

When Supply Chain works, the mission moves.

ROC Spain: Fully operational with optimized fast-access zones for Culinary, Tech, and Branding

When Jenn Armand (Director of Events & Engagement) brought the swag bag request to Sergio:

"

Absolutely! You're welcome to use the ROC to prepare the swag bags. Let me know the total weight, dimensions, and how the swag bags will be packed for transport, and I'll take care of organizing the pickup and delivery.

— Sergio Alonso Aguilar
ROC Madrid Manager

This is the standard
Immediate yes. Clear ask for specs. Owns the solution end-to-end. This is how Supply Chain partners across the organization.

Critical Path

Week of June 10-14

Madrid & Retreat
Pallets clearing customs. WCK team retreat logistics finalized. ROC Spain supporting comms swag prep.
▶
Expected pallets clear June 11-12. Retreat prep wraps June 14. All team logistics fully coordinated through ROC Spain partnership.
Fleet Readiness
ROC South RRMK fire suppression completion. ROC East maintenance decisions due.
▶
RRMK: Final touches + Stagecoach back on road by Friday. ROC East: Approve tires/HVAC by mid-week to maintain schedule and hurricane season readiness.
ROC Spain Decisions
Spartan agreement resolution, Ford partnership negotiation, Tech software install, Vanis kits training.
▶
Spartan: Legal review underway. Ford: Awaiting global partnership details. Tech: Install window mid-week. Vanis: Training prep starts next week.
